calendar.matters:
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Dismissal Of Entire Action Filed

SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Mar-12-2014 Continued To Mar-18-15 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 206 for Hearing.
Dept.611, Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported.

Bik Lin Chan anbd Joshua Humphrey are present in pro per for Plaintiff Chan Living Trust.
Defendant John Lang present in pro per.

The Court and parties conference regarding settlement.
After conference with the parties, case settled. Terms of settlement placed in writting by the court and signed by the parties, but not enter into the record.
The Court orders the matter continued to March 18, 2015 at at 10 a.m. in Dept. 506.
If monthly payment is paid in full, no appearances are necessary and matter will be dismissed on March 18, 2015.

CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $223.00
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-11-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 611

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Continued To Mar-10-14 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 206
